name: Easter Bunnies on a Stick
recipeInstructions:
1. Purchase molds, sticks, and plastic sleeves from a candy supply store.
2. Melt the coatings using an electric fry pan with water on low heat, or small stainless steel or glass bowls for different colors.
3. Fill the taffy molds with chocolate coating.
4. Place a stick into each mold.
5. Roll the molds to coat them completely in the melted chocolate.
6. Set the molds in the refrigerator for 1-2 minutes to make the coating shiny and set.
7. Once cooled to room temperature, place the coated bunnies in plastic sleeves.
8. Enjoy these treats at your Easter family dinner and give some to great Aunt Joni in Jersey!
